work_unit: MONI-API-001: cap Monte Carlo n_sims + spawn_blocking
situation: Derived fix from audit-2026-07-07-028 finding MONI-API-001 (HIGH). run_wfo_monte_carlo accepted unbounded n_sims and ran synchronous CPU loop on async runtime → DoS vector.
action: Capped n_sims at 10,000, added daily_returns length validation (max 100k), wrapped moni_wfo::run_monte_carlo in tokio::task::spawn_blocking. cargo check passed.
outcome_evidence: cargo check -p moni-api: Finished dev profile. Branch auto/opt-wfo-monte-carlo-dos-1783358633 pushed to origin. Commit contains MAX_MONTE_CARLO_SIMS=10_000 constant, MAX_MONTE_CARLO_RETURNS=100_000 constant, spawn_blocking wrapper.
next_suggestion: Dispatch M-003-engine (update_quotes stale cloned orders double-fill) — next highest severity pending route-fix from audit-2026-07-07-028

audit_findings.finding: Unbounded Monte Carlo n_sims + synchronous CPU work on async runtime → DoS
audit_findings.remediation: Cap n_sims at 10k, validate daily_returns len ≤ 100k, wrap in spawn_blocking
